# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an IAM role that allows cross-account access for our CI/CD system. Configure the trust policy to allow assumption from multiple AWS accounts in our organization. Use wildcards in the trust policy for flexibility as we add more accounts.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
    "AWSTemplateFormatVersion": 2010-09-09,

    "Parameters":{
        "AdminGroup":[
            {
                "Description":"The name of the Admin Group to be created",
                "Type":"String"
            }
        ],

        "AdminPolicy":[
            {
                "Description":"The name of the Admin Policy to be created",
                "Type":"String"
            }
        ]
    },

    "Resources":{
        "Role":[
            {
                "Type": "AWS::IAM::Role",
                "Properties": {
                    "AssumeRolePolicyDocument": [
                        {
                            "Version": "2012-10-17",
                            "Statement": [
                                {
                                    "Effect":"Allow",
                                    "Action":["sts:AssumeRole"],
                                    "Principal":{
                                        "AWS":[
                                            {
                                                "Fn::Join": [
                                                    "",[
                                                    "arn:aws:iam::",
                                                    {"Ref" : "AWS::AccountId"},
                                                    ":root"
                                                ]
                                            }
                                        ]
                                    },
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                    ],

                    "Policies":[{
                        "PolicyName":"AdminPolicy",
                        "PolicyDocument": {
                            "Version":"2012-10-17",
                            "Statement":[
                                {
                                    "Effect":"Allow",
                                    "Action":["s3:GetObject"],
                                    "Resource": [
                                        "*"
                                    ]
                                },
                                {
                                    "Effect":"Allow",
                                    "Action":["s3:*"],
                                    "Resource": [
                                        "*"
                                    ],
                                    "Condition":{
                                        "StringLike":{"aws:SourceAccount":[
                                            {"Ref":"AWS::AccountId"}
                                        ]}
                                    }
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                    }]
                }
            }],
        "AdminGroup":[{
            "Type": "AWS::IAM::Group",
            "Properties": {

            },
            "DependsOn":["Role"]
        },{
            "Type": "AWS::IAM::GroupPolicyAttachment",
            "Properties":{
                "GroupName":{"Fn::GetAtt":"AdminGroup","Arn"},
                "PolicyArn":{"Fn::GetAtt":"Role","Arn"}
            }
        }]
    }
}
